Ajay Kumar

Java Developer | DevOps Learner

About Me

Hello! My name is Ajay Kumar. I am a Java Developer with 1.5 years of experience. Currently I am learning DevOps tools like Docker, CI/CD, and AWS.

Skills

  • Java
  • Spring Boot
  • Docker
  • AWS EC2
  • Git & GitHub

Projects

Docker Nginx Deployment

Created a custom Docker image and deployed Nginx using Docker Compose on AWS EC2.

DevOps 90 Days Challenge

Learning DevOps tools step-by-step including Linux, Shell Script, Docker, CI/CD.
